# Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check one. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new user-facing feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — internal restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `build` / `ci` — build system or CI
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance (deps, tooling, etc.)
- [ ] Breaking change (note in commit body with `BREAKING CHANGE:` or `type!`)

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? Stress tests, manual scenarios, gates run, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated if user-visible
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` updated if scope moved between Now/Next/Later
- [ ] Docs in `docs/` updated if behavior or interfaces changed
- [ ] No internal-only content (day plans, session notes, demo spec) added to this tree
- [ ] Touched code paths still pass relevant tests in `tests/`
